subject: resnet18-imagenet-agx3-performance-estimator-400mbps

config.estimator_invocation: source scripts/env.sh >/dev/null 2>&1 && dla_compiler --fanalyze-performance --march models/arch/AGX3_Performance.arch --network-file models/ir/resnet18-imagenet/int8/resnet18-imagenet.xml --foutput-format open_vino_hetero --fplugin HETERO:FPGA --o out.aot --dumpdir models/compiled/_ph0_scratch/resnet18-imagenet_o2zlwwpj --overwrite-output-files --fdump-performance-report perf.txt --fassumed-memory-bandwidth 400

notes: FPGA AI Suite performance-estimator (HETERO:FPGA) output for resnet18-imagenet (int8). Memory-bandwidth bottleneck reported: throughput was scaled down from the compute-only rate to match the assumed external memory bandwidth. DDR filter (weight) reads per inference: 38.370 MB vs 11.171 MB of on-disk INT8 weights -> 3.43x re-read factor. Weights are being streamed from external memory on every inference, not folded into on-chip M20K -- this arch is not a DDR-free/MIF-resident configuration regardless of model size. Activation-spill traffic (DDR feature reads + writes) per inference: 5.810 + 3.260 = 9.070 MB -- refines PLAN §5's flat 2.5 MB spill constant (above it by 6.57 MB).
